backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (UserProfile, Question, Test, TestResult) and backend logic for an ICP-based test platform, including admin management, user registration, question/test CRUD, result submission, and leaderboard functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single implemented feature: a rewrite of the Navbar component to ensure all navigation elements are always rendered with proper flex layout, conditional links, and a working mobile hamburger menu.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key implementation details of each component, page, and hook.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that imports base/components/utilities layers and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Concept Delta' and mounting the app via a module script pointing to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with five routes (/, /dashboard, /test/$testId, /admin, /results) and renders a global Toaster notification component.
frontend/src/components/admin/AddQuestio: Admin modal dialog for uploading a new question via image file, selecting the correct answer option (A–D), and submitting it using the addQuestion mutation with validation and toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/admin/Leaderboar: Admin leaderboard component that fetches and displays students ranked by average test score in a table, with styled rank badges for the top three positions.
frontend/src/components/admin/QuestionGa: Admin gallery that lists all questions as cards with their images and correct answer labels, and includes a button to open the AddQuestionModal for adding new questions.
frontend/src/components/admin/ResultsLis: Admin component that fetches and displays all test submission results in a table, showing user ID, test name, score, and submission timestamp.
frontend/src/components/admin/TestBuilde: Admin component for creating new tests by selecting questions, setting name/subject/duration, and managing publish/unpublish status of existing tests.
frontend/src/components/admin/UserList.t: Admin component that fetches and displays all registered users in a table showing their name, class, and contact number.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky navy navbar component with always-visible Home link, conditional Dashboard and Admin Panel links based on auth/admin state, a Login/Logout button, and a mobile hamburger menu with matching conditional links and no overflow/z-index conflicts.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Full-screen modal for first-time users to set up their profile by entering full name, class (11th/12th/Dropper), and contact number, with validation and backend save via a React Query mutation.
Renders a single quiz question as an image with A/B/C/D answer buttons, highlighting the selected option and showing a fallback message if the image is unavailable.
frontend/src/components/TestCard.tsx: Displays a summary card for a test including its name, subject, duration, and question count, with a button that navigates to the test-taking route.
frontend/src/components/TestTimer.tsx: Countdown timer component that counts down from a given duration in seconds, turns red and pulses when under 60 seconds, and calls a callback when time expires.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, reinitializing dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend interactions including user profile, admin checks, tests, questions, results, and leaderboard operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, OKLCH-based navy color palette CSS variables for light and dark modes, and custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin panel page that checks authentication and admin status, redirecting unauthorized users, and renders tabbed sections for managing questions, tests, users, results, and leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Authenticated user dashboard showing stats (tests attempted, average score, best score) and a list of published tests, with a profile setup modal for new users.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Public landing page with a hero section, CTA to log in or go to dashboard, and a profile setup modal triggered for newly authenticated users without a profile.
frontend/src/pages/Leaderboard.tsx: Empty leaderboard page file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx: Authenticated page displaying the user's past test submissions in a table with score, percentage, and submission date, mapped to test names from published tests.
frontend/src/pages/Test.tsx: Test-taking page that loads questions for a given test, tracks user answers, handles submission, and shows a post-submission answer review with correct/incorrect indicators.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom theme with navy color palette, OKLCH CSS variables, custom fonts, border radii, shadows, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for 'Concept Delta', a MHT-CET test series app, recording architecture decisions, existing features, known issues (navbar visibility, image sizing), and current build version (49).
